mapper.select: SELECT * FROM b_board_type WHERE BT_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY BT_KEYNO
SELECT T.* FROM b_board_type T LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager M ON T.BT_KEYNO = M.MN_BT_KEYNO WHERE M.MN_KEYNO = #{MN_KEYNO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO b_board_type( BT_KEYNO, BT_TYPE_NAME, BT_CODEKEY, BT_REPLY_YN, BT_COMMENT_YN, BT_SECRET_YN, BT_UPLOAD_YN, BT_FILE_CNT_LIMIT, BT_FILE_SIZE_LIMIT, BT_REGNM, BT_REGDT, BT_EDU_PR_YN, BT_TICKET_PR_YN, BT_SNS_YN, BT_RSS_YN, BT_USE_YN, BT_HTML_YN, BT_THUMBNAIL_YN, BT_THUMBNAIL_WIDTH, BT_THUMBNAIL_HEIGHT, BT_EMAIL_YN, BT_EMAIL_ADDRESS, BT_PAGEUNIT, BT_PAGESIZE, BT_DEL_LISTVIEW_YN, BT_HTMLMAKER_PLUS_YN, BT_DEL_COMMENT_YN, BT_XSS_YN, BT_FILE_IMAGE_WIDTH, BT_FILE_IMAGE_HEIGHT, BT_FILE_EXT, BT_NUMBERING_TYPE, BT_SHOW_MINE_YN, BT_DEL_POLICY, BT_PERSONAL_YN, BT_PERSONAL, BT_MOVIE_THUMBNAIL_YN, BT_CATEGORY_YN, BT_CATEGORY_INPUT, BT_SECRET_COMMENT_YN, BT_THUMBNAIL_INSERT, BT_LIST_KEYNO, BT_DETAIL_KEYNO, BT_INSERT_KEYNO, BT_CALENDAR_YN, BT_PREVIEW_YN, BT_PAGEUNIT_C, BT_PAGESIZE_C, BT_DEL_MANAGE_YN, BT_SUBJECT_NUM, BT_FORBIDDEN_YN, BT_FORBIDDEN ) VALUES( #{BT_KEYNO}, #{BT_TYPE_NAME}, #{BT_CODEKEY}, #{BT_REPLY_YN}, #{BT_COMMENT_YN}, #{BT_SECRET_YN}, #{BT_UPLOAD_YN}, #{BT_FILE_CNT_LIMIT}, #{BT_FILE_SIZE_LIMIT}, #{BT_REGNM}, SYSDATE, #{BT_EDU_PR_YN}, #{BT_TICKET_PR_YN}, #{BT_SNS_YN}, #{BT_RSS_YN}, 'Y', #{BT_HTML_YN}, #{BT_THUMBNAIL_YN}, #{BT_THUMBNAIL_WIDTH}, #{BT_THUMBNAIL_HEIGHT}, #{BT_EMAIL_YN}, #{BT_EMAIL_ADDRESS}, #{BT_PAGEUNIT}, #{BT_PAGESIZE}, #{BT_DEL_LISTVIEW_YN}, #{BT_HTMLMAKER_PLUS_YN}, #{BT_DEL_COMMENT_YN}, #{BT_XSS_YN}, #{BT_FILE_IMAGE_WIDTH}, #{BT_FILE_IMAGE_HEIGHT}, #{BT_FILE_EXT}, #{BT_NUMBERING_TYPE}, #{BT_SHOW_MINE_YN}, #{BT_DEL_POLICY}, #{BT_PERSONAL_YN }, #{BT_PERSONAL}, #{BT_MOVIE_THUMBNAIL_YN}, #{BT_CATEGORY_YN}, #{BT_CATEGORY_INPUT}, #{BT_SECRET_COMMENT_YN}, #{BT_THUMBNAIL_INSERT}, #{BT_LIST_KEYNO}, #{BT_DETAIL_KEYNO}, #{BT_INSERT_KEYNO}, #{BT_CALENDAR_YN}, #{BT_PREVIEW_YN}, #{BT_PAGEUNIT_C}, #{BT_PAGESIZE_C}, #{BT_DEL_MANAGE_YN}, #{BT_SUBJECT_NUM}, #{BT_FORBIDDEN_YN}, #{BT_FORBIDDEN} )
mapper.update: UPDATE b_board_type SET BT_TYPE_NAME = #{BT_TYPE_NAME}, BT_CODEKEY = #{BT_CODEKEY}, BT_REPLY_YN = #{BT_REPLY_YN}, BT_COMMENT_YN = #{BT_COMMENT_YN}, BT_SECRET_YN = #{BT_SECRET_YN}, BT_UPLOAD_YN = #{BT_UPLOAD_YN}, BT_FILE_CNT_LIMIT = #{BT_FILE_CNT_LIMIT}, BT_FILE_SIZE_LIMIT = #{BT_FILE_SIZE_LIMIT}, BT_MODNM = #{BT_MODNM}, BT_EDU_PR_YN = #{BT_EDU_PR_YN}, BT_TICKET_PR_YN = #{BT_TICKET_PR_YN}, BT_SNS_YN = #{BT_SNS_YN}, BT_RSS_YN = #{BT_RSS_YN}, BT_MODDT = SYSDATE, BT_HTML_YN = #{BT_HTML_YN}, BT_THUMBNAIL_YN = #{BT_THUMBNAIL_YN}, BT_THUMBNAIL_WIDTH = #{BT_THUMBNAIL_WIDTH}, BT_THUMBNAIL_HEIGHT = #{BT_THUMBNAIL_HEIGHT}, BT_EMAIL_YN = #{BT_EMAIL_YN}, BT_EMAIL_ADDRESS = #{BT_EMAIL_ADDRESS}, BT_PAGEUNIT = #{BT_PAGEUNIT}, BT_PAGESIZE = #{BT_PAGESIZE}, BT_DEL_LISTVIEW_YN = #{BT_DEL_LISTVIEW_YN}, BT_HTMLMAKER_PLUS_YN = #{BT_HTMLMAKER_PLUS_YN}, BT_DEL_COMMENT_YN = #{BT_DEL_COMMENT_YN}, BT_XSS_YN = #{BT_XSS_YN}, BT_FILE_IMAGE_WIDTH = #{BT_FILE_IMAGE_WIDTH}, BT_FILE_IMAGE_HEIGHT = #{BT_FILE_IMAGE_HEIGHT}, BT_FILE_EXT = #{BT_FILE_EXT}, BT_NUMBERING_TYPE = #{BT_NUMBERING_TYPE}, BT_SHOW_MINE_YN = #{BT_SHOW_MINE_YN}, BT_DEL_POLICY = #{BT_DEL_POLICY}, BT_ZIP_YN = #{BT_ZIP_YN}, BT_PERSONAL_YN = #{BT_PERSONAL_YN }, BT_PERSONAL = #{BT_PERSONAL}, BT_MOVIE_THUMBNAIL_YN = #{BT_MOVIE_THUMBNAIL_YN}, BT_CATEGORY_YN = #{BT_CATEGORY_YN}, BT_CATEGORY_INPUT = #{BT_CATEGORY_INPUT}, BT_SECRET_COMMENT_YN = #{BT_SECRET_COMMENT_YN}, BT_THUMBNAIL_INSERT = #{BT_THUMBNAIL_INSERT}, BT_LIST_KEYNO = #{BT_LIST_KEYNO}, BT_DETAIL_KEYNO = #{BT_DETAIL_KEYNO}, BT_INSERT_KEYNO = #{BT_INSERT_KEYNO}, BT_PREVIEW_YN = #{BT_PREVIEW_YN}, BT_PAGEUNIT_C = #{BT_PAGEUNIT_C}, BT_PAGESIZE_C = #{BT_PAGESIZE_C}, BT_DEL_MANAGE_YN = #{BT_DEL_MANAGE_YN}, BT_SUBJECT_NUM = #{BT_SUBJECT_NUM}, BT_FORBIDDEN_YN = #{BT_FORBIDDEN_YN}, BT_FORBIDDEN = #{BT_FORBIDDEN} WHERE BT_KEYNO = #{BT_KEYNO}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM b_board_type WHERE BT_USE_YN = 'Y' AND BT_KEYNO = (SELECT MN_BT_KEYNO FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_KEYNO = #{MN_KEYNO} )
SELECT * FROM b_board_type WHERE BT_USE_YN = 'Y' AND BT_KEYNO = (SELECT MN_BT_KEYNO FROM s_menu_manager WHERE MN_KEYNO = (SELECT BN_MN_KEYNO FROM b_board_notice WHERE BN_KEYNO = #{BN_KEYNO}) )
